title: Subledger Account Entry
description:
An Account Entry on a Subledger Account

A subledger account entry is a single debit or credit record that captures the financial impact of a business transaction on a specific subledger account, providing detailed, transaction-level accounting information that is later summarized and posted to the General Ledger.


A subledger account entry is the atomic debit or credit posting that records detailed financial activity for a specific subledger account and rolls up to the general ledger.
